name: RenderPanels
summary: This class is used to extend the standard Render user interface

methods.name: FromRenderSessionId
methods.signature: public static Object FromRenderSessionId(PlugIn plugIn, Type panelType, Guid renderSessionId)
methods.summary: Get the instance of a render panel associated with a specific render session, this is useful when it is necessary to update a control from a RenderPipeline

params.name: plugIn
params.doc: The plug-in that registered the custom user interface

params.name: panelType
params.doc: The type of panel to return

params.name: renderSessionId
params.doc: The RenderSessionId of a specific render session.

returns.doc: Returns the custom panel object if found; otherwise null is returned.

methods.name: RegisterPanel(PlugIn, RenderPanelType, Type, String, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use RegisterPanel(PlugIn plugin, RenderPanelType renderPanelType, Type panelType, Guid renderEngineId, string caption, bool alwaysShow, bool initialShow)")] public void RegisterPanel(PlugIn plugin, RenderPanelType renderPanelType, Type panelType, string caption, bool alwaysShow, bool initialShow)
methods.summary: Register custom render user interface with Rhino. This should only be done in RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels). Panels registered after RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels) is called will be ignored.

params.name: plugin
params.doc: The plug-in providing the custom user interface

params.name: renderPanelType
params.doc: See RenderPanelType for supported user interface types.

params.name: panelType
params.doc: The type of object to be created and added to the render container.

params.name: caption
params.doc: The caption for the custom user interface.

params.name: alwaysShow
params.doc: If true the custom user interface will always be visible, if false then it may be hidden or shown as requested by the user.

params.name: initialShow
params.doc: Initial visibility state of the custom user interface control.

methods.name: RegisterPanel(PlugIn, RenderPanelType, Type, Guid, String, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public void RegisterPanel(PlugIn plugin, RenderPanelType renderPanelType, Type panelType, Guid renderEngineId, string caption, bool alwaysShow, bool initialShow)
methods.summary: Register custom render user interface with Rhino. This should only be done in RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels). Panels registered after RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels) is called will be ignored.

params.name: plugin
params.doc: The plug-in providing the custom user interface

params.name: renderPanelType
params.doc: See RenderPanelType for supported user interface types.

params.name: panelType
params.doc: The type of object to be created and added to the render container.

params.name: renderEngineId
params.doc: The render engine id allowing the UI to be shown.

params.name: caption
params.doc: The caption for the custom user interface.

params.name: alwaysShow
params.doc: If true the custom user interface will always be visible, if false then it may be hidden or shown as requested by the renderer.

params.name: initialShow
params.doc: Initial visibility state of the custom user interface control.

methods.name: RegisterPanel(PlugIn, RenderPanelType, Type, Guid, String, Boolean, Boolean, RenderPanels.ExtraSidePanePosition)
methods.signature: public void RegisterPanel(PlugIn plugin, RenderPanelType renderPanelType, Type panelType, Guid renderEngineId, string caption, bool alwaysShow, bool initialShow, RenderPanels.ExtraSidePanePosition pos)
methods.summary: Register custom render user interface with Rhino. This should only be done in RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels). Panels registered after RegisterRenderPanels(RenderPanels) is called will be ignored.

params.name: plugin
params.doc: The plug-in providing the custom user interface

params.name: renderPanelType
params.doc: See RenderPanelType for supported user interface types.

params.name: panelType
params.doc: The type of object to be created and added to the render container.

params.name: renderEngineId
params.doc: The render engine id allowing the UI to be shown.

params.name: caption
params.doc: The caption for the custom user interface.

params.name: alwaysShow
params.doc: If true the custom user interface will always be visible, if false then it may be hidden or shown as requested by the renderer.

params.name: initialShow
params.doc: Initial visibility state of the custom user interface control.

params.name: pos
params.doc: The position to dock the extra side pane at.
